category_title: Children who exhibit aggressive interpersonal behaviors
scenario_title: Refusal to tidy up toys during free play transition
minimal_context: The student is asked to tidy up their toys during the transition from free play in the kindergarten classroom.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Free play is over. It is time to tidy up the toys.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: No! I am not done playing.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: You need to put the toys in the box now.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Gets angry) I said no! (Snatches a toy from the child sitting next to him)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please give the toy back and start cleaning up.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Throws a tantrum) No! (Kicks the toy box over and pushes the other child)

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Free play is over. It is time to tidy up the toys.

STUDENT: No! I am not done playing.

TUTOR: You need to put the toys in the box now.

STUDENT: (Gets angry) I said no! (Snatches a toy from the child sitting next to him)

TUTOR: Please give the toy back and start cleaning up.

STUDENT: (Throws a tantrum) No! (Kicks the toy box over and pushes the other child)

context.environment: Kindergarten classroom during daily activities including free play
context.social_setting: Interacting with other children and teacher

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: Display of resistance by the target child towards instructions or requests from the teacher, such as refusing to tidy up toys or stop aggressive behaviours
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Attacking other children (e.g. hitting, kicking, biting, pushing or pinching), destroying others’ toys (e.g. snatching or breaking them), crying without stopping

behavior_patterns.condition: Experiencing difficulties with following instructions, transitions, and classroom routines
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Tantrum throwing, kicking, biting, using inappropriate language
